violations.text: At the time of inspection, recently received boxed candy items were observed stored on the floor in the upstairs storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor until capable of being loaded to the retail shelving space. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

The door to the walk-in cooler located in the retail area was not in good repair. The door is observed to be sagging leaving a gap in the sealing of the door and not allowing for tight closure. Facility equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023

The dropped ceiling tiles over the retail shelving area of the store were observed to have staining from water due to a possible roof leak. The ceiling tiles are to be replaced and any repairs needed for possible roof leaks are to be completed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2023
